summary: Iteration 17 testing completed. Verified the new 'How It Works' documentation page at /how-it-works route. All 42 frontend tests passed (100%). The page renders correctly with all required sections, collapsible components, sticky TOC navigation, and proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: Frontend: /how-it-works route loads with data-testid='how-it-works-page'
Frontend: Hero section with data-testid='how-hero' present
Frontend: 'How BMIA Works' title displayed
Frontend: Documentation badge visible (v3.0 — Hardened Pipeline)
Frontend: Metric badge 'Stocks: 2,400+' visible
Frontend: Metric badge 'LLMs: 3 (Consensus)' visible
Frontend: Metric badge 'Strategies: 6 Portfolios' visible
Frontend: Metric badge 'Capital: ₹3 Cr' visible
Frontend: Metric badge 'Guardrails: 5 Code-Enforced' visible
Frontend: Metric badge 'MC Paths: 10,000' visible
Frontend: Philosophy section with 'Quant Has No Emotions' heading
Frontend: Philosophy section has 3 principle cards (Code Over Conviction, Data Over Narrative, Consensus Over Single-Point)
Frontend: System Architecture section (#architecture) with ASCII diagram
Frontend: ASCII diagram shows full stack (FRONTEND, BACKEND, MongoDB)
Frontend: Market Cockpit section with 'What's displayed' collapsible (default open)
Frontend: Symbol Analysis section with Technical Analysis (25+ indicators) collapsible
Frontend: Symbol Analysis section with Fundamental Analysis (30+ metrics) collapsible
Frontend: God Mode Scanner section with 4-step pipeline (A/B/C/D)
Frontend: Signal Engine section with code-enforced guardrails detail
Frontend: Portfolio Engine section with 6 strategy cards
Frontend: Hardening Layer section with 5 numbered guardrails (1-5)
Frontend: LSTM + Monte Carlo section with LSTM Neural Network collapsible
Frontend: LSTM + Monte Carlo section with Monte Carlo (GBM) collapsible
Frontend: Walk-Forward Tracking section present
Frontend: Anti-Hallucination Protocol section with 4 levels
Frontend: Risk Management Framework section with table (10 rows)
Frontend: SEBI Disclaimer at bottom with data-testid='sebi-disclaimer-how'
Frontend: Sticky TOC navigation visible on desktop (xl screens)
Frontend: TOC has 14 navigation items
Frontend: 'How It Works' link visible in sidebar navigation
Frontend: Collapsible sections expand/collapse on click
Frontend: TOC navigation scrolls to correct section
Frontend: Navigation from home page to How It Works works correctly
Frontend: URL correctly shows /how-it-works after navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified the new How It Works documentation page. The page is a pure frontend component with no backend API dependencies. Key features: (1) Hero section with metric badges showing system capabilities. (2) 14 documentation sections covering Philosophy, Architecture, Market Cockpit, Symbol Analysis, God Mode Scanner, Signal Engine, Portfolio Engine, Hardening Layer, 5-Year Backtest, LSTM + Monte Carlo, Walk-Forward, BSE Guidance, Anti-Hallucination, and Risk Framework. (3) Collapsible sections for detailed content. (4) Sticky TOC navigation on desktop (xl screens). (5) SEBI disclaimer at bottom. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.
